The men were secretly arrested at
night and in the early morning
placed aboard a special train which
carried them to Idaho. In order
that there might be no interference
on the route, necessary changes Of
engines was made at country sid
ings and not at stations.


A protest against this proceeding.
made by the prisoners, was carried
to the United States supreme court,
but the case was decided against
them.


WV lol was WY
chief executive of Idaho during the
great Occur d'Alene strike in 1898,
and it was he who called in the
federal troops to restore order. The
strikers were imprisoned in a
stockade, where they endured many
hardships, and their families mean
time were left unprotected and I'M
provided for. The feeling on bCrh
sides was intensely bitter at the
time and after the settlement union
men, by being refused employment,
were run out CT TIE country


Steunenberg' murder occurred
several years after he left the gov
ernor's chair The miners say
that he had passed from their
minds and that they had harbored

murder so long after his retire
